steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Geographic isolation is presented as an indisputable, significant fact—thousands of miles from the Islamic intellectual center. The blank must describe something that makes highlighting this remote location meaningful to the argument.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Scholars have shown his works actually mattered to other philosophers, so geographic isolation—which would normally prevent influence—becomes a striking paradox. “Inconsequential to” captures this: scholars undermined the claim that his works didn't matter to contemporaries. The other options don't create this logical tension between distance and significance. That matches choice D — D is correct.
